sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n212" key="a)brwsi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀ-βρωσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n212.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">want of food, fasting,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> </bibl> <pb n="4" TEIform="pb"/> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:39" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.39</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
